349.issue_title: Template Workspace Initiative: workspace-owned templates, schema packs

cycles.name: C_CONFIG.1

deliverables.description: ArtifactRegistryConfig and artifacts.yaml use declarative SchemaFieldDef
Update tests/mcp_server/config/test_component_registry.py to cover the new schema parsing

cycles.exit_criteria: ArtifactRegistryConfig parses schema definition correctly and both test_component_registry.py and test_artifact_registry_config.py pass

cycles.name: C_ENGINE.2

deliverables.description: ArtifactManager refactored to build frozen Pydantic models at runtime
PYDANTIC_SCAFFOLDING_ENABLED flag and V1 fallback logic removed

cycles.exit_criteria: get_schema() outputs valid JSON Schema, scaffold_artifact fails fast on invalid input, feature flag deleted

cycles.name: C_CLEANUP.3

deliverables.description: Test helpers DRYed out and 17 parity tests deleted

cycles.exit_criteria: No Python module lookups remain, ~23 Context files and ~21 RenderContext files deleted, 21 entries migrated

cycles.name: C_MODULAR_LOADER.4

deliverables.description: Refactor loader.py to support modular scanning and merging of artifacts/*.yaml configs

cycles.exit_criteria: Loader unit tests verify directory scanning and merging

cycles.name: C_MIGRATE_MODULAR.5

deliverables.description: Migrate monolithic artifacts.yaml to modular config/artifacts/ files and add typescript_dto template

cycles.exit_criteria: Full test suite passes and typescript_dto runs smoke test

cycles.name: C_OCP_REFACTOR.6

deliverables.description: Refactor ArtifactDefinition to support flexible type field and strict_validation flag
Refactor ArtifactManager to enforce strict validation based on configuration instead of code type check

cycles.exit_criteria: Refactor registry and manager to be OCP-compliant for artifact validations
